title: Running Up That Hill (A Deal with God)
lyric_hint:
It doesn't hurt me.
Do you want to feel how it feels?

title: Cómo hablar
lyric_hint:
Cómo hablar sin tener nada que decir
Sin creerse buen orador

title: SAOKO
lyric_hint:
Yo me transformo, mariposa
Saoko, papi, saoko

title: La Deriva
lyric_hint:
El tiempo pone a cada uno en su lugar
Pero qué lugar si todo se mueve

title: Un buen día
lyric_hint:
Y hoy es un buen día para beber
Un buen día para emborracharse

title: Everything in Its Right Place
lyric_hint:
Everything, everything
Everything in its right place

title: All My Friends
lyric_hint:
If I could see all my friends tonight
If I could see all my friends tonight

title: Good Luck, Babe!
lyric_hint:
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling
Good luck, babe!

title: Begin Again
lyric_hint:
We can begin again
I know you wanna dance

title: Sprawl II (Mountains Beyond Mountains)
lyric_hint:
They heard me singing and they told me to stop
Quit these pretentious things and just punch the clock

title: Ceremony
lyric_hint:
This is why events unnerve me
I watch the news and it burns me

title: ay mamá
lyric_hint:
Ay mamá, qué dolor
Ay mamá, qué dolor de tetas

title: Kill Bill
lyric_hint:
I might kill my ex
Not the best idea

title: Washing Machine Heart
lyric_hint:
Do my tears till your garden
Do I make you wanna be better?

title: Copacabana
lyric_hint:
Y ahora que todo parece en calma
Y ahora que nadie nos espera

title: Bizarre Love Triangle
lyric_hint:
Every time I see you falling
I get down on my knees and pray

title: A-Punk
lyric_hint:
Johanna drove slowly into the city
The Hudson River all filled with snow

title: Break My Soul
lyric_hint:
You won't break my soul
I'm about to explode

title: I Bet You Look Good on the Dancefloor
album: Whatever People Say I Am, That's What I'm Not
lyric_hint:
Stop making the eyes at me
I'll stop making the eyes at you

title: La vida cañón
lyric_hint:
La vida cañón, la vida cañón
Que me quiten lo bai-la-do
